examples.title: Presentation Flow Optimizer
examples.code:
ALGORITHM DefenseFlow
BEGIN
  Allocate 2min: Hook/Problem Statement
  Allocate 5min: Methodology Innovation
  Allocate 8min: Key Results
  Allocate 3min: Implications/Future Work
  Reserve 2min: Q&A Buffer
END
examples.explanation: Ensures time-critical elements receive adequate attention
